title: 🛏️ Code from Bed
description: Learn to code with Claude. Build real projects. No pants required. From zero to your first deployed app in 4 weeks.

title: 🤖 AI Literacy for Humans
description: Understand what Claude actually does. Master prompting. Use AI like a pro, not a parrot. Deep knowledge of LLMs, not just surface-level hype.

title: ⚡ Build Cool Tools Fast
description: Make tools that save you hours. Use AI to do the boring stuff. Ship in days, not months. CLI tools, web apps, and APIs.

title: 🚀 AI Agents that Work
description: Create agents that code, research, debug, solve problems. The future starts now. Deploy autonomous systems that actually work.
